internalName: Baan Maliwan at Dhevatara Residence Estate
place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Three-Storey Hillside Oceanview Villa
note: Fully staffed · chef on request · + tax & service
blurb: A three-storey hillside villa of around 693 m² in a managed beachfront residence estate at Bophut, with elevated ocean views, a 12-metre pool and a bean-bag terrace. Just 130 metres from the beach and a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village. Pavilion-style en-suite bedrooms, a master with sunken bathtub and balcony, and an optional private chef.
detail:
Take in elevated ocean views from this three-storey hillside villa within a managed beachfront residence estate at Bophut. The 693 m² property sits just 130 metres from the beach and a six-minute drive from Fisherman’s Village.

Lounge in a spacious air-conditioned living and dining room beside an outdoor terrace lined with bean bags, then dip into the adjacent 12-metre pool while admiring the sea. The property has a pavilion-style layout, with all bedrooms in a modern tropical design and their own en-suite bathrooms — one enjoys direct pool access, while two more on the top floor share a lovely vantage point. The largest bedroom adds its own balcony and a sunken bathtub with an ocean view.

The kitchen is well equipped with a central island that doubles as a breakfast bar, and the fully-staffed villa offers an optional private chef to prepare meals throughout the day at an additional cost. Kayaks, yoga mats and a BBQ are available on request. The shoreline directly in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach.

features.l: Kayaks · yoga mats · BBQ on request
130 m to beach · 6 min to Fisherman’s Village
